# Figure

**Object**

The component for including a figure.

## Declaration

```swift
object Figure
```

## Discussion

Use the `figure` component to display illustrations such as graphs, diagrams, and drawings. Other components are available for other types of images, such as [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Photo], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Portrait], and [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Logo].

See [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/preparing-image-video-audio-music-and-arkit-assets].

### Example

```json
{
  "components": [
    {
      "role": "heading1",
      "text": "1. Four Years, Little Rain"
    },
    {
      "role": "figure",
      "URL": "bundle://figure.jpg"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Images

- **Image**: The component for displaying JPEG, WebP, PNG, or GIF images.
- **Photo**: The component for including a photograph.
- **Portrait**: The component for including an image of a person.
- **Logo**: The component for including a logo image.
- **ReplicaAdvertisement**: The component for delivering digital versions of print advertisements.
- **CaptionDescriptor**: The object you use in image components for displaying captions when the image is full-screen.

## Inherits From

- Component
